schemaVersionExclusivityMechanism.chosen: unified C# model with nullable dual fields + SchemaVersionShapeValidator (source-integrity layer) + JSON Schema oneOf (defense-in-depth)
rejectedAlternatives: separate C# record types per schema version
schemaVersionExclusivityMechanism.rejectionRationale: This codebase's dominant invariant layer is its C# validators, not JSON Schema (no document schema sets additionalProperties:false). Separate types would fragment CatalogSourceSnapshot and every consumer into type-switch branches for a two-field-scope migration.

exactLookupApis: CatalogSourceSnapshot.FindWorkout(string key, int version) -- exact, no auto-selection
CatalogSourceSnapshot.GetRequiredWorkout(string key, int version) -- exact, throws if missing

determinismProof.liveProof: Candidate bundle TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE v4 built twice via CLI build-bundle; byte-identical output both times.

domainContentImpact: none -- candidate pins the same versions legacy auto-selection already resolves today (EASY_STANDARD v2, FARTLEK v2, THRESHOLD_TEMPO v2, GOAL_PACE_TEN_K v1); classified TECHNICAL_ONLY
